intro: Run, Jump, and Devour All the Honey
description:
Dive into an irresistible chase in Honey Sprint, where a hungry bear must escape a furious swarm while collecting as much honey as possible along the way. With simple controls and nonstop action, each run blends quick reflexes, smart decisions, and pure fun.

Dodge obstacles, slide under branches, and jump at the right moment to keep your flow while chasing ever-higher scores. The tracks change with every attempt, always bringing fresh challenges and that addictive “just one more run” feeling.

Colorful, dynamic, and full of personality, Honey Sprint is perfect for quick sessions and lighthearted moments, delivering an engaging experience that balances challenge and pure entertainment.
